title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Streusen, Big Mom, Unknown person #6, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #7 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Weeed- diningg

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: CAAAAAK- KEEEEE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OH NO!! It'S THE QUEEN'S EATING DISORDER!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: She's having another tantrum again so soon..!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just remembered that she couldn't eat the wedding cake, since it got destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That person she's holding in her hand....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's Brother Opera!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me that you got your lifespan sucked out!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...!! Even if you're reckless, you should've known not to stand up to her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nobody else get close to her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should all know this already!! There's no way to stop Mama's eating dis- order...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unless you bring out the food she wants!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where's the head chef!? He's the only person able to remake the cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Streusen
dialogue.text: ...that's the thing... streusen-sama is..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even though he saved every- one's life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He failed to make a good landing him- self!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll take more than a few days for him to recover...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did you say!? Then how the hell are we going to stop Mama!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It'll be bad to let her rampage in the capital...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Furthermore, we

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Mama!! There is a wedding cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Turns

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: brother Peros!! stop! What are you saying!?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: There was a spare cake made, Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One that was made using carefully selected ingredients. To the point of making you drool...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: The beest wedding cake (1)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wanted Mama to eat it no matter what, but!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shockingly, it was stolen by the straw hat crew!! Perorin~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right now, they are trying to escape and are heading towards the south-western bay!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Wedding cake...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's right!! They have it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She should still be able to hear to some extent!! If she goes after them, it'll be two birds with one stone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Steering her away...is it possible?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If you're lying...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll definitely pay for it with your lifespan..!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Zeeeuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuss!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Yes, mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wedding CAAAAKEE EEEE!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
